title: GTA Online
headline: GTA Online
subtitle: Protect Los Santos During the Latest Neighborhood Watch Event
content:
Clean up the streets and assist residents across Los Santos and Blaine County during the new Neighborhood Watch Event.

This multifaceted special event now running through April 15 features a pair of new Bravado Buffalo Law Enforcement Vehicles hitting the streets, new Dispatch Work assignments tracking fugitives and conducting prisoner transports, expanded bonuses for upstanding citizens fighting fires and running down bounty targets, and more.
